subject: The first U.S. Senator who worked at Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Why you need to act, right now.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a3b0/c1f7015/6ab2c2e0/11418a4a/3588949402/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_el?refcode=rtw_20180812_em-full") Friends, The right to choose is under attack. **A radical right-wing Supreme Court nominee from Trump, a Vice President who wants _Roe vs. Wade_ overturned, and a Senate that will do anything to take away the right to safe and legal abortion.** The best defense we have is a strong group of pro-choice Democratic women in the U.S. Senate -- and now one of them needs our help. Tina Smith is facing a giant fundraising deadline for her campaign in August -- and is falling behind her goal. **[Extremist politicians who want to roll back women's rights are desperately trying to make sure we don't elect a true champion of reproductive freedom to the Senate -- will you step up and help close the gap before her big deadline? Make a contribution of $5 or more now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a3b0/c1f7015/6ab2c2e0/11418a4a/3588949402/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_el?refcode=rtw_20180812_em-full")** Tina is the first U.S. Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood and will strongly defend a woman's right to access the full range of reproductive health care. That's why we endorsed her, and why we are doing everything in our power to make sure she has the resources she needs to win this race. But Republicans like Ted Cruz and Mitch McConnell are doing everything in their power to silence voices like Tina's in the U.S. Senate. They will make sure dark money donors, super PACs, and special interests put Minnesota at the top of their target list. They know if they defeat Tina, their anti-choice agenda is one step closer to reality. **That 's why I'm coming to you now: Will you sit back and watch another anti-choice politician take us backward? Or will you step up to ensure we have a strong pro-choice Democratic woman fighting for all of us in the Senate?** **[Make a contribution of $5 or more before Tina's August primary deadline as a way of saying enough with the attacks on women. Every dollar helps elect a strong, pro-choice Democratic woman to the U.S. Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a3b0/c1f7015/6ab2c2e0/11418a4a/3588949402/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_el?refcode=rtw_20180812_em-full")** Thank you for being a part of this fight, Emily Cain

Peter,

**I have pledged to refuse all corporate contributions, including corporate PAC donations**. Our democracy should not be for sale. Too often, elected "representatives" make decisions to benefit themselves and their donors, instead of the people they are entrusted to serve. [**My campaign relies on grassroots support to reach the people of this District. Please give $20 or more today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1890741/9923150/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTI2YWNlZS1mNTllLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KaB5KZnmQLCC_3EahpkKW7pVCTHzBJjtyDZhZcmHlQI=).

**This week, a Congressman from New York was [indicted for insider trading](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1890742/9923151/-349009057?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTI2YWNlZS1mNTllLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KaB5KZnmQLCC_3EahpkKW7pVCTHzBJjtyDZhZcmHlQI=&action=click&module=Top%20Stories&pgtype=Homepage). **The scandal is widespread: Rep. Collins shared secret information; he used his congressional authority to benefit his businesses; and he brought other Representatives into his investments. The whole thing stinks to high heaven.

**And unfortunately, Rep. Collins is not unique. My opponent Michael McCaul has several similar incidents in his past:**
* In 2012, [McCaul pushed for federal approval of the Keystone XL pipeline project](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1890743/9923152/-1202865573?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTI2YWNlZS1mNTllLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KaB5KZnmQLCC_3EahpkKW7pVCTHzBJjtyDZhZcmHlQI=) while also having as much as $300,000 invested in the project;
* In 2013, McCaul [advocated for increased detention of immigrants in for-profit jails,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1890744/9923153/768468257?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTI2YWNlZS1mNTllLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KaB5KZnmQLCC_3EahpkKW7pVCTHzBJjtyDZhZcmHlQI=) while simultaneously receiving campaign contributions from the largest private detention operators;
* In 2018, McCaul [reported owning over $1,000,000 in Facebook stock](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1890745/9923154/-557830000?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTI2YWNlZS1mNTllLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KaB5KZnmQLCC_3EahpkKW7pVCTHzBJjtyDZhZcmHlQI=). At the same time, as Chairman of Homeland Security, he has done nothing to investigate how foreign entities have used Facebook to influence U.S. elections.

**These are just a sample of a larger pattern of corruption and abuse of power. It won't stop until we change who is in office.**

I am running for Congress to continue my vocation as a public servant. For twenty years, I have worked as a public school teacher and educator, a civil rights lawyer, and an assistant city attorney.

**There are no corporate tentacles dictating my movements. This campaign is about helping people live better lives.**

**[Chip in $20 today to help us reach as many voters as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1890746/9923155/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTI2YWNlZS1mNTllLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KaB5KZnmQLCC_3EahpkKW7pVCTHzBJjtyDZhZcmHlQI=) **With your help, we will let the people of the Texas 10th know they have a real choice, between a self-serving incumbent and a public servant. Let's clean House,
Mike

name: Mel Hall
subject: Keep our latest ad on air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

I know my campaign manager, Max, emailed you this week about our newest ad, "Minster."

When we were making our ads, we tried to be as simple and direct as we could about why I'm running and the kind of work I want to do for you in Congress. The same values of hard work and personal responsibility are what I learned as a farmer, taught in my ministry, and guided my actions as a business leader.

These principles are who I am, and my commitment to them is unshakable. I won't let myself get distracted by the day to day of the campaign, or the special interests and perks of Washington. Period. But first, we have to win this election, and part of that is making sure our message gets out.

**Can you please chip in to help show our new ad to as many Hoosiers as we can?**

body:
Hey Friend, need to loop you in on this chain with Kirby. (See below.) We're meeting to lay out our strategy for the general election first thing tomorrow morning, and we're still missing about 300 responses to the survey we sent around recently.
This race is _tied_ , and we're really depending on input from supporters like you to help us break this dead heat and win. So will you take just a minute or two right now to let me know what's on your mind?
Here's the link to the survey: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/mccaskill-july-priorities](https://surveys.signforgood.com/mccaskill-july-priorities/ctrl?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1242-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Claire
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kirby
Date: Mon, Aug 13, 2018 at 8:53 AM
Subject: Re: survey responses
To: Claire McCaskill
We've gotten lots of great responses, but we'd still really like to hear from about 300 more people before tomorrow's meeting. Could you reach out to our top supporters and make sure they've had a chance to take the survey?
Kirby
On Mon, Aug 13, 2018 at 8:02 AM, Claire McCaskill wrote:
Hey Kirby - how are our survey response numbers looking? Looking forward to going through the results tomorrow.
Claire
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

subject: Rebuilding America’s ‘unmatched power’
body:
| |

The White House • August 13, 2018
## The Day Ahead

President Donald J. Trump will sign the National Defense Authorization Act for the next fiscal year. [_Watch live at 2:30 p.m. ET_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODEzLjkzNjEzMTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxMy45MzYxMzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY5NTIxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d).
## **Rebuilding America’s ‘unmatched power’**

**Restoring our national security** is a core piece of President Trump’s agenda to reinvigorate America. Today, that promise is being kept as the President signs the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) for Fiscal Year 2019. **The NDAA enhances the President’s ability to help protect the Nation** by authorizing $716 billion in funding for defense and military activities. This unprecedented support will help to deter our adversaries and maintain the Trump Administration’s policy of peace through strength. The NDAA also fulfills the President’s request to give our troops a much-deserved pay raise. **The NDAA also strengthens our support** for allies. In reinforcing our bond with Israel, it authorizes the co-development and co-production of missile defense systems. The NDAA also bolsters our support for European allies against Russian aggression by funding the European Deterrence Initiative. **“In confronting these dangers,** we know that weakness is the surest path to conflict, and unmatched power is the surest means of our defense,” President Trump says addressing his national security policy. [_Watch live as President Trump will sign the NDAA at 2:30 pm ET._](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODEzLjkzNjEzMTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxMy45MzYxMzE3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY5NTIxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# Tax cuts have unleashed America’s economic potential
**Many Americans enjoyed tax-free shopping this weekend.** This sales tax holiday gave many working families a break on items such as clothing and school supplies. **In the wake of President Trump’s tax cuts,** Americans are seeing more money in their paychecks. Harriet Torry recently wrote in _The Wall Street Journal_ that “U.S. workers received their biggest pay increases in nearly a decade,” according to the Department of Labor. **The American economy is also reaching new heights** as we saw GDP growth of 4.1 percent in the second quarter. The President’s pro-growth economic agenda is delivering exactly what it promised. “My Administration remains very focused on the issues that will encourage economic growth—that’s what we’re all about,” President Trump said.

They’re going to be talking about this:

First, Senator Ted Cruz launched three nasty ads attacking Beto and our
campaign, just hours after a new poll found Beto down two points -- within
the margin of error.

So our team did what we do best: we organized quickly and fought back,
setting an ambitious goal to raise $1 million that weekend. Without a dime
from PACs, you surpassed our goal, raising $1,274,528 -- and the average
donation was just $32. Real people doing real work at a really important
moment.

Now, we’re putting the money you raised to use. All of it. I just got news
that our $1.27 million media buy is confirmed. It includes running Beto’s
positive TV ads in each of Texas’ 20 media markets! Texans across the
state will start seeing our ads this week.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/3311?refcode=em20180813&t=1019&akid=3654%2E444211%2EQc5QOd ]We’re hitting the airwaves at a critical time, and it’s all thanks to
people like you pitching in to make it happen. Help us celebrate a first
for our campaign by making a donation of
$3
or more to help us keep Beto’s TV ads on the air.

Beto is taking our campaign directly to communities across Texas,
listening to people in each of our state’s 254 counties -- Democrats,
Republicans, Independents and non-voters alike. He’s 15 days into a 34-day
road trip across Texas, and he’s already logged more than 3,200 miles from
El Paso to Longview. The trip will feature nearly 100 events in more than
50 cities.

Not every Texan can join us at one of Beto’s stops this month, so we need
to make sure they hear our message another way. Keeping our new TV ads up

It's almost here: tomorrow is Primary Election Day.
Minnesota regularly has the highest voter turnout in the country, and this year we're on track to break new records.
This is one of the most important elections of our lives. Minnesotans will decide who serves in both U.S. Senate seats, and all the seats in the U.S. House and the Minnesota House -- and elect a new governor, too!

name: Tina Smith
subject: A short note from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
(I even included a picture of my puppy Moose!)

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a3db/c1f7015/6aba1c35/11418c8e/428883073/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180813_em") Friends, In the U.S. Senate, I usually fly home to Minnesota on Thursday afternoon, and then get back on the plane to Washington on Monday morning. But last week was different: I've was home in Minnesota all week, working and squeezing in a few walks with Moose my puppy in between. (Here's a picture from our morning walk.) It's great to be home. In the last week, I've been to Farmfest in Redwood County, St. Cloud, Duluth, Shakopee, Little Canada, and the Twin Cities. I've talked with farmers, rural electric co-op leaders, community members at National Night Out, small business people and police officers, truck drivers and retirees, school teachers and construction trades people, and my neighbors who wanted to say hi to Moose. And best of all, I spent time with a group of Minnesota high school students with some great ideas for how to create safer, healthier schools and better, more equitable opportunities for post-secondary education -- whether that be at a four-year college or career and technical training. In St. Cloud, I visited the St. Cloud Promise Neighborhood, where neighbors and the St. Cloud police department were connecting with each other, and the local police officers were teaching kids in the neighborhood how to master double dutch jump rope. When they asked me to join in, I told the kids I would try, though I didn't think I could do it. Amazingly, with excellent instruction, they taught me what to do, and here's a picture to prove it! My favorite moment was right after, when one of the little girls gave me a high five and said, "I knew you could do it!" This last summer week, just before the Primary (remember to vote on August 14!), has been a good reminder of what I love about this state -- the people. In the midst of these divisive times, I get my inspiration from all these people. I work for them, and for you, and that's what gets me back on that plane on Monday mornings. **[So thank you again for everything you are doing, and for making sure our campaign has the resources to organize the volunteers, talk to voters, travel the state, and do everything we need to do to make sure our campaign can stay grassroots and people-powered.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a3db/c1f7015/6aba1c35/11418c8e/428883073/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august?refcode=rtw_20180813_em")** So grateful for everything you are doing, Tina

In St. Cloud, I visited the St. Cloud Promise Neighborhood, where neighbors and the St. Cloud police department were connecting with each other, and the local police officers were teaching kids in the neighborhood how to master double dutch jump rope. When they asked me to join in, I told the kids I would try, though I didn't think I could do it. Amazingly, with excellent instruction, they taught me what to do, and here's a picture to prove it! My favorite moment was right after, when one of the little girls gave me a high five and said, "I knew you could do it!" This last summer week, just before the Primary (remember to vote on August 14!), has been a good reminder of what I love about this state -- the people. In the midst of these divisive times, I get my inspiration from all these people. I work for them, and for you, and that's what gets me back on that plane on Monday mornings. "" So grateful for everything you are doing, Tina

The Congressional race here in Virginia's 7th District continues to draw national attention -- The New York Times just published a feature story about our race and Abigail's historic candidacy!
| | Peter, The Congressional race here in Virginia's 7th District continues to draw national attention, no doubt thanks to the surging groundswell of homegrown support we've built over the past year. In case you missed it, **_The New York Times_ just published a feature story about our race and Abigail's historic candidacy!** _The Times_ joined us for a campaign event recently and found what we already know to be true: 7th district Democrats have built an unprecedented grassroots movement to replace Dave Brat, a Tea Party ideologue who ignores his constituents, with an accessible public servant in Abigail. _Here 's the headline:_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/G2YcfZaofApZ-LRnPh0gl7bEKOehBpxnjMmyHzP_uIE=/YtDz05ZOHf2deOROfz8STjw26XvE6Icz1hy06zNtXs0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.13_b1_jj_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Peter, this recognition in _The New York Times_ is a testament to our growing strength in this toss-up race, and a sign that our outreach efforts are paying off. name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: I'm mad, this is wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
The RGA is lying to voters.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b442/7ab0e2c4/7fc077e0/349b0f82/2061535399/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-rga-ads?refcode=OHQ08138A") I can't lie to you, I'm mad -- it's frustrating to see Republicans constantly harping about "fake news" when they're the ones creating it. Last week, the Republican Governors Association started airing an attack ad on local TV here that is pretty deceptively edited to scarily paint Ben as a "socialist." It's edited to say, "Go ahead, call me a socialist" -- but it's missing the second half of that sentence, which ended "That doesn't change the fact I'm a venture capitalist." **This is downright false advertising, but the RGA has put $1 million behind it anyway. We've called on these TV stations to pull down the ads, but we can't wait -- we have to fight back now.**[**Donate $5 or more now to fund the fight against these false TV ads.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b442/7ab0e2c4/7fc077e0/349b0f82/2061535399/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-rga-ads?refcode=OHQ08138A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b442/7ab0e2c4/7fc077e0/349b0f8d/2061535399/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-rga-ads?refcode=OHQ08138A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

---
Larry Hogan followed up this ad by sitting down for an interview with _The New York Times_ to call Ben a "far-left socialist who wants to increase the state budget by 100%, increase taxes by 100%, free everything."
Hogan and the RGA clearly don't want to do their homework, so Ben had to take them back to school -- Ben has invested in countless startups that are changing communities for the better through small business investments. All this, while Maryland keeps slipping behind its neighboring states under Governor Hogan's leadership.
We have a winning message that Republicans are fighting tooth and nail, because they're afraid of it -- we can win, but we need the funds to fight.
[**We don't have to match the RGA's $1 million TV ad buy, but we need to show we're united against this false advertising -- donate $5 or more now to help get the real message out to voters on Ben's plans for Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b442/7ab0e2c4/7fc077e0/349b0f82/2061535399/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-rga-ads?refcode=OHQ08138A")

Travis

name: Steve Schultz
subject: Immune to attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | My wife Debbie likes to say she's immune to Republican attacks, you know. You've probably seen her say it before. She says she's developed "gator skin" over the years. None of the attacks can stop Debbie from fighting to protect health care access, keep our communities safe, or protect seniors' Medicare and Social Security. But while Debbie may be immune from attacks, **Florida voters are not**. A Koch-linked group has already attacked her. Her opponents (all 5 of them) continue to attack her. Those attacks, without a strong response, can stick in voters' minds. The FEC Pre-Primary Filing deadline is in three days. **If we want to keep this network strong, we need to get $16,000 into the GOTV Victory Fund before that deadline.[_Can you rush in a contribution to help us out?_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f73/622b7b5b/1c52d65e/307b9519/2028222373/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180814?refcode=dwse180814_m&recurring=true&amount=5")** Debbie works harder than anyone I know. Every day, she's working toward a new plan to stop Republicans from defunding Planned Parenthood, or keep "ghost guns" off our streets, or accomplish any one of the thousand things she wants to do to keep Florida's families safe and thriving. She can't do it alone. [_**Let's make sure Debbie has the resources to be successful in the primary and beyond. Help fill our GOTV Victory Fund before the FEC deadline.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f73/622b7b5b/1c52d65e/307b9519/2028222373/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180814?refcode=dwse180814_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f73/622b7b5b/1c52d65e/307b9519/2028222373/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180814?refcode=dwse180814_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

Steve Schultz

Peter,

State-sponsored anti-LGBTQ discrimination.

That's what Donald Trump and Jeff Sessions are pushing with last month's announcement of the so-called "religious liberty task force."

It's another in a long line of attacks on the LGBTQ community by this administration, and we won't stand for it.

We've endorsed LGBTQ candidates up and down the ballot who will fight to protect equal rights for all.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight back against bigotry and discrimination.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c48b1/24c69fd9/25dc97b11/1884655a/1454086321/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180813_email_TaskForce?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFET33N_digital_email_20180813_TaskForce_inact&source=WQEFET33N_digital_email_20180813_TaskForce_inact")**

Since the inauguration, the Trump administration has repeatedly tried to sanction discrimination against the LGTBQ community on religious grounds.

These attacks are inextricably tied to attacks on reproductive freedom. In January, the Department of Health and Human Services created a "Conscience" Division to let health care providers with religious or moral objections deny care to LGBTQ people or people seeking reproductive health care.

That's why we've endorsed LGBTQ candidates who will fight to protect both equal rights and reproductive freedom.

We're supporting candidates like Kyrsten Sinema (AZ-SEN), Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23), Angie Craig (MN-02), Katie Hill (CA-25), and Sharice Davids (KS-03), who just last week won her primary and would be the first openly gay member of her state's delegation to the U.S. House.

We also have to re-elect the first-ever openly LGBTQ governor, Kate Brown (OR), and re-elect the first openly LGBTQ senator, Tammy Baldwin (WI).

All of these women will tirelessly work to defend our rights from attacks by the Trump administration.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will protect LGBTQ rights:**

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, State-sponsored anti-LGBTQ discrimination. That's what Donald Trump and Jeff Sessions are pushing with last month's announcement of the so-called "religious liberty task force." It's another in a long line of attacks on the LGBTQ community by this administration, and we won't stand for it. We've endorsed LGBTQ candidates up and down the ballot who will fight to protect equal rights for all. "" Since the inauguration, the Trump administration has repeatedly tried to sanction discrimination against the LGTBQ community on religious grounds. These attacks are inextricably tied to attacks on reproductive freedom. In January, the Department of Health and Human Services created a "Conscience" Division to let health care providers with religious or moral objections deny care to LGBTQ people or people seeking reproductive health care. That's why we've endorsed LGBTQ candidates who will fight to protect both equal rights and reproductive freedom. We're supporting candidates like Kyrsten Sinema (AZ-SEN), Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23), Angie Craig (MN-02), Katie Hill (CA-25), and Sharice Davids (KS-03), who just last week won her primary and would be the first openly gay member of her state's delegation to the U.S. House. We also have to re-elect the first-ever openly LGBTQ governor, Kate Brown (OR), and re-elect the first openly LGBTQ senator, Tammy Baldwin (WI). All of these women will tirelessly work to defend our rights from attacks by the Trump administration. name: Pledge Update from Jessalyn Reid
subject: Thank you for making our pledge against hate a success 💛
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you.

**Because of you, our mission to use this amazing grassroots team to send a strong message that hate is not a Virginia value was a huge success!** [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129d/3e0906/6f07cfd2/3e356de8/2673679648/VEsH/ "https://timkaine.com/take-action-reject-hate?source=20180813_1_PET_JR_Pledge-TY&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180813_1_PET_JR_Pledge-TY") | [**TAKE ACTION AGAINST HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129d/3e0906/6f07cfd2/3e356def/2673679648/VEsE/ "https://timkaine.com/take-action-reject-hate?source=20180813_1_PET_JR_Pledge-TY&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+TAKE+ACTION+AGAINST+HATE&utm_campaign=20180813_1_PET_JR_Pledge-TY")
---
I can't tell you how grateful I am - this pledge has been incredibly important to everyone on this team, _especially Tim himself_. He's been reaching out to me often, checking in to find out how many people are signing up to reject hate in their communities.

**And I 've been proud to report good news every time, thanks to the thousands of you who stepped up each day to say "no hate in our state." **

The one-year anniversary of the deadly white supremacist rally in Charlottesville has passed - but that doesn't mean the need to stand against hate is over. **And the best way to fight back against hate in your community is by getting involved.**

[We have opportunities for you to get involved in every inch of Virginia, as well as opportunities to help out if your heart is in Virginia but your body isn't! Find out more here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129d/3e0906/6f07cfd2/3e356dee/2673679648/VEsF/ "https://timkaine.com/take-action-reject-hate?source=20180813_1_PET_JR_Pledge-TY&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+We+have+opportunities+for+you+to+get+inv&utm_campaign=20180813_1_PET_JR_Pledge-TY")

Thank you for being a part of this,

_Jess_

Jessalyn Reid
Team Kaine Digital Director

name: President Jimmy Carter
subject: Georgia needs Stacey Abrams.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa95d/34a064cc/af1f9df/70e8023/2640148020/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - I know Stacey Abrams. Her heart and commitment to our state shine through her leadership and service. Furthermore, as a former governor of Georgia myself, I know that Stacey has the courage and ability to serve every Georgian well - no matter where they call home. After leaving the White House, I returned home to Plains, Georgia. Plains is a town of about 700 people - it has grown a lot since I was a child, and Georgia as a whole has changed quite a bit in my lifetime. As my favorite high school teacher, Miss Coleman, used to say, "We must accommodate changing times, but cling to unchanging principles." Stacey Abrams is the right leader for our changing state who has consistently championed the American values we share: equality for all, excellent public schools for our children, and an economy where families from Plains to Plainville and Pooler have the opportunity to get ahead. Stacey Abrams' experience, vision, and proven track record of building consensus across party lines are beyond compare, and I will work as hard as I can to elect her in November. With Stacey Abrams in the governor's mansion, our state will be in good hands and the Georgia of tomorrow will be bright. At a time when we desperately need more bold leadership at all levels of government, I am proud to support Stacey Abrams' gubernatorial campaign in this historic race. President Jimmy Carter
39th President of the United States
76th Governor of Georgia

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: We did it! Thank you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We've received almost 17,500 donations from more than 11,000 people.
#

Peter -
I wanted you to be the first to know that thanks to supporters like you, we beat our goal before last week's deadline.
Not only did we generate more individual contributions in a week than all of our opponents reported collectively in July, but we passed a couple more major milestones. Today, we're excited to report that we've received almost **17,500 donations from more than 11,000 people, and 97% of these donations were less than $200.**
We did all of that while **rejecting corporate money, rejecting fossil fuel money and rejecting big real estate money** -- none of our opponents can say the same.
The primary is officially one month away from today. On September 13, we will cast our ballots. That means we have to work even harder for the next month. But with all we've accomplished so far, I know I can count on you to help us win this race.
This is all possible because supporters like you are standing with us to demand an independent Attorney General who will take on corruption wherever it exists.
Every dollar you can give, every hour you can volunteer, everything you can do to help us win means the world to me. So thank you again for supporting our campaign.
All my best,
Zephyr Teachout

* * *

**With the primary just one month away, our team is working hard to reach out to voters and share Zephyr's vision. If you can afford to, please make a donation today to help us continue that work. Thank you again for your support.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Smoke and mirrors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Donald Trump is making another stupid move on climate change.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7867b/2f5ea88d/76fe7bd1/2cbc2d57/3694007543/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emissions-rollback?utm_source=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&refcode=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&utm_campaign=emmision-standards&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Donald Trump and his band of climate change deniers at the EPA are up to their old tricks again. This time, they're gutting vehicle emission standards and reversing the _Clean Air Act_ \-- a critical part of our climate action legacy. States like Washington and California have made significant progress by adopting rigorous greenhouse gas emission benchmarks. But while states are trying to lead, Trump is set on reversing that progress -- and limiting individual state's rights to set standards that make our people healthier and our economy stronger. It's a petulant political move by the Trump EPA, aimed at gutting the climate change agenda of the Obama administration to reduce vehicle emissions over the next decade. [**Friend, ending this constant barrage of attacks on our environment requires taking back our country. Can you pitch in with a donation to help me build our progressive movement?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7867b/2f5ea88d/76fe7bd1/2cbc2d57/3694007543/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emissions-rollback?utm_source=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&refcode=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&utm_campaign=emmision-standards&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7867b/2f5ea88d/76fe7bd1/2cbc2d57/3694007543/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emissions-rollback?utm_source=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&refcode=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&utm_campaign=emmision-standards&utm_medium=ema")
---
From day one, Donald Trump and his administration have been hell-bent on rolling back environmental protections.
The president has deliberately loaded the EPA and Interior Department with climate change deniers, intent on reversing decades of scientific research and progress.
Donald Trump and his surrogates would rather put the health of our children and grandchildren at risk than stand up to the fossil fuel industry and protect our clean air.
As former California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger recently said, "This is a stupid policy." I couldn't agree more.
And it's all the more reason why Democrats must take back Congress this November, before the impact of Trump's abominable climate-denying agenda becomes irreversible.
[**We need a blue wave in order to elect Democrats who care about climate change and our environment. Please chip in now to let me know you're on my team as we build this progressive movement.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7867b/2f5ea88d/76fe7bd1/2cbc2d57/3694007543/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emissions-rollback?utm_source=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&refcode=ema_2018-08-13_emmision-standards&utm_campaign=emmision-standards&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

| Friend,
---
| As you know, tomorrow is the Republican Primary Election, and **I’m asking for your support.** With your support two years ago, and your help since, we’ve begun charting a new course for the state we love.

**Now, I need your help so we can continue our progress.** In just over a year and a half, we’ve prevented $71 million in projected property tax rate increases; eliminated the tax on Social Security for low- and middle-income Vermonters; lowered income tax rates across the board for all filers, saving $30 million; added workers to our labor force for the first time in years; increased access for opioid addiction treatment; worked to support our veterans; invested in economic development, expanded community development grants; and so much more.

**We can’t make Vermont more affordable overnight, but we’ve made critical steps in that direction, and with your support tomorrow, we’ll continue the hard work. **

Vermonters deserve a governor who understands our challenges, and will devote their entire time in office to making Vermont an even better place to live, work and raise a family. I will continue to be that governor for you, and I’d be honored to have your support

**I humbly ask for your vote, tomorrow. **

Thank you,

Phil

---

I met with some donors last week, and they are so invested in Pennsylvania's Senate race that they're going to **_[match every online donation up to $15,000](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180813_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**.

This is huge: ever since Bob took a stand against President Trump's Supreme Court nominee and the corrupt, corporate special interests that picked him, national Republicans have doubled-down on trying to flip this Senate seat for the GOP. Just this month, President Trump came right here to Pennsylvania to campaign for Bob's opponent, raising an estimated _$1 million_ in the process.

**_[That's why we have to take advantage of this match opportunity: outside money is going to flow into Pennsylvania this year, so we have to maximize every possible dollar of grassroots support. Can you chip in $5 to fight back today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180813_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

We can't afford to miss this $15,000 goal, it's too important. Congressman Lou Barletta stood on stage in Wilkes-Barre and asked Pennsylvania voters to help him help President Trump -- not to help ordinary Pennsylvanians that are trying to make ends meet. That's not the type of leader Pennsylvanians need in the Senate. The administration knows that losing their Senate majority would stop them from implementing even more of their anti-middle-class agenda, and flipping this seat is their insurance policy.

**Bob will continue to stand up to this administration when they come after protections for people with pre-existing conditions and programs like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, but he needs your help to do it. body:
Tomorrow at 7 a.m., Wisconsin heads to the polls to make their choice on who will go head to head with Tammy Baldwin in November.

Friend,

Tomorrow at 7 a.m., Wisconsin heads to the polls to make their choice on who will go head to head with Tammy Baldwin in November.

And I'll just say it...

**I’m the only candidate who can defeat Senator Baldwin.**

We have the grassroots support in Wisconsin.

We have the only proven, conservative record.

We have Reince Priebus, the NRA, Wisconsin Right to Life, Paul Ryan, Jim Sensenbrenner, Sean Duffy, Glenn Grothman, First Lady Tonette Walker and 750+ endorsements throughout our state and party.

And tomorrow, we can make sure we don't let them down by winning the Republican primary.
[1 DAY LEFT: $25](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1f0b197e0b31440181b0ba81c91d97ed&_e=8KCsvWesW0mLOFmkmXDBcqU02y6SKIF7txv9rU3XZfVYJyaPFc6z-QQ6rFAcmVwMrzSkP_1Z-q7_rNqqIx-7KS1hrOXTZn9iiX_Fxii-_TNVyBj94fGLEc8DQVY6zp5XQ9hAOx1z7AHhBkrkyoYuSXnuHqz32B4EjJlxRYHE6qEAe_yasR37WyQEbTRkUmXtjNsxJEvc8kH60QD7cnyAwrGnj7SP7Ap66f8JmS685JAOFjhb8ru5jEeQ3g7I_NUYbOj8FrSTC_iYjNwtQK4MNZfa5TmS9Tu_9vwV0cJqCHeiSCZntTea-89wlJusnrwVFEgKF6DLWsZRVYVRE0uds5jlztETh810ljIjr1oPekZWepEGkUbPHHGK5qRiU5alDdOuJVAXu1RskEN7ZUYjWf5C5kWUwVY07Rj2ujDT_hA%3D)
---

With just over 24 hours left, we have NO time to waste. We have to keep up our hard work and march full speed ahead to victory.

I just need your help making sure we’re prepared for any last-minute needs. [**Can you make an emergency donation today?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1f0b197e0b31440181b0ba81c91d97ed&_e=8KCsvWesW0mLOFmkmXDBcqU02y6SKIF7txv9rU3XZfU2vbYKnCaa4tt1KRNHGhTgHZ5R5ssVGJJ0qz4lN13IXrBGaAart9zyV2VfYwD0eiabmh444j4agVeSghYzmG5o9YItL4n4VNV_aekicUJ04E7qQLEnjaLHBoy3n-Ev7MbarrihRFTH7oOmMbG5kN4IcIkK-BCtypFaGaQuP-L60eQc_fNIWAcT3FnGdjCy9YZtE2hNBfyQJQie44QiifClFpRL1EYnqONlzRjy761gTgyCGFwgYy1y6YPNd0DjqmfscaJ0PjvwR0ZE4o3broKdj4kw7eTlB9GVc1_54jvRxkzx87O-m8Wf2L6YhoZ8bZpwTMHvZdC4SWPo919Tcd1zNIzSCcJBmjFc6xoxGT2oL89oH31TT1RypaWDKm5DBZY%3D)
